description.ko: 궤도 시점에서 촬영한 퇴적층과 자연 침식 패턴의 복잡한 아름다움을 강조하는 지구 표면 질감에 대한 상세한 시각적 연구입니다.
description.en: A detailed visual study of Earth's surface textures, highlighting the complex beauty of sedimentary layers and natural erosion patterns captured from an orbital perspective.

prompt: Ultra-high-definition satellite photography of layered rock formations and sediment deposits, showcasing diverse geological textures, rich ochre and sienna tones, cinematic lighting, top-down aerial perspective, intricate natural patterns.
